titles.title: The Battle Is the Lords (Holding on to His Word)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holding on to His word Like a mighty sword in our hands With the shield of faith, And all God's armor in place, We can stand.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the battle is the Lords, By faith we can endure, When the battle is the Lords, The victory is sure, There is nothing to prove, There is nothing to lose, When the battle is the Lords.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When the battle is the Lords, Our faith will soon be sight, When the battle is the Lords, We will not need to fight, There is nothing to prove, There is nothing to lose, When the battle is the Lords, The battle is the Lords

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the valley of fear Giants drawing near, Threatening, Lord, please open our eyes, Heaven's on our side, We can sing.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We know the One who's in us, Is greater than he in this world, So we'll claim the ground God gives us, Let the banners be unfurled.
